creator: martymac@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Dmitry,

> graphics/osg update which is required to update simgear is ready:
> http://people.freebsd.org/~amdmi3/osg.patch

Thanks !

Simgear+Flightgear update is now also ready :

http://people.freebsd.org/~martymac/patches/20120315-patch-flightgear-2.6.0.txt

New Simgear builds fine with both old and new boost.

Best regards,

--
Ganael LAPLANCHE <ganael.laplanche@martymac.org>
http://www.martymac.org | http://contribs.martymac.org
